headline: DuPont Launches Tyvek® APX™ in ASEAN Market
summary: DuPont (NYSE:DD) today announced it has launched Tyvek® APX™ in the ASEAN market at Thailand Safe@Work 2026 in Bangkok. Through the culmination of scientific research and customer collaboration, Tyvek® APX™ fabric is the most advanced form of Tyvek® material to date and provides outstanding levels of breathability without compromising protection or durability.

content.title: DuPont Launches Tyvek® APX™ in ASEAN Market
content.summary: DuPont (NYSE:DD) today announced it has launched Tyvek® APX™ in the ASEAN market at Thailand Safe@Work 2026 in Bangkok. Through the culmination of scientific research and customer collaboration, Tyvek® APX™ fabric is the most advanced form of Tyvek® material to date and provides outstanding levels of breathability without compromising protection or durability.

thumbnail.caption: DuPont Personal Protection has unveiled Tyvek® APX™, a new disposable chemical garment fabric designed to improve wearer comfort while maintaining reliable protection in demanding work environments.
